title: Process Safety Engineer
description:
We are looking for a

Process Safety Engineer (m/f/d)

to join our Process Safety department at Advario in Singapore, starting as soon as possible.

Job Profile:

The Process Safety Engineer leads the implementation and continuous improvement of Process Safety Management (PSM) systems to identify, assess, control and monitor major hazard risks in the terminals. The PSE leads the delivery of Process Safety initiatives by collaborating with Engineering, Operations, HSSE teams and regulatory authorities to ensure compliance with Singapore’s regulations and industry best practices.

He/She tracks PSM performance data and contributes to the development and maintenance of the relevant sections of the organisation's Major Hazard Installation (MHI) Safety Case. He/She conducts process safety reviews and hazard/risk studies for existing and new facilities. The PSE also participates in process safety incident investigations and follows up on preventive and corrective actions.

Your Tasks:

1) Administer Process Safety Management Systems

  • Support Process Safety framework adoption and implementation for the local organization in accordance to relevant local regulations, internal and industry standards/best practices.

  • Ensure governance of Process Safety Management (PSM) system is in place to achieve organization's operational effectiveness and efficiency, reliable reporting, compliance to laws, regulations and policies through:

    - Develop operational process safety solutions by defining, studying, estimating, and screening alternative solutions.

    - Improve operational process safety results by studying, evaluating, and recommending process re-design; implementing changes; contributing information and opinion to engineering design and modification teams.

    - Monitor and report key process safety performance indicators, track action closure, support audits and compliance reviews, promote continuous improvement in risk control.

  • Investigate Process Safety incidents with the local team and propose suitable improvements / recommendations to avoid reoccurrence.

  • Identifies operational process safety problems by observing and studying system and performance results.

2) Support Process Engineering Projects

  • Review and/or provide support in e.g. Process Hazard Analyses (PHA), MOCs, risk assessments, safety studies, Safety Case and project designs, to ensure process safety related considerations are identified and addressed.

  • Develop recommendations and addressing Process Safety deficiencies identified in these reviews, where applicable and ensure relevant documentation is complete.

  • To systematically seek out process safety improvement opportunities and assess risk to ALARP

3) Administer Staff and Organizational Development

  • Build Process Safety competency in the organization through training sessions on process safety topics.

Your Profile:

  • Bachelor’s degree in in Chemical Engineering, Process Engineering, Safety Engineering (or equivalent with relevant experience)

  • Minimum 5 years working experience in oil and gas industry, specializing in process safety and hazard management

  • Strong knowledge of process hazard identification and risk assessment methods and tools (e.g. HAZOP, LOPA, QRA, Bowtie).

  • Knowledge of international and local safety standards and regulatory requirements (e.g., API, NFPA, SS, functional safety).

  • Strong terminal operations knowledge, its drivers from a technical and risk point of view.

  • Good communication, analytical, problem-solving and stakeholder-management skills; able to work across engineering, operations, maintenance and HSSE teams.

  • Proficient in consequence modeling software (preferred).

Please note:

  • This position is based in Jurong Island

  • Official Working hours: Mon - Fri, 0830 - 1700 hours

We offer you among other things:

  • Special benefits and company events organized for employees

  • Employees are covered under the group insurance plan, with dependent coverage for hospitalization

  • Lunch is provided while in the terminal and company shuttle bus transport to and from Jurong East MRT

postedCompany.description:
We are a leading global player in the storage industry, with a focused growth strategy on chemicals, gas and new energy and a strong commitment to embed ESG and sustainability across our entire operations. Advario is a carve-out of Oiltanking GmbH and we are committed to play a frontrunner role in the energy transition through developing transformational partnerships.


The storage industry has a key role to play to progress the energy transition and ensure undisrupted, secure access to low carbon energy everywhere in the world. This transition is complex and requires close coordination and cooperation of all partners across the whole value chain. And that is exactly what our strategy is built on. We want to create better business through transformational partnerships. As fossil remains part of energy mix for some time to come, we will continue our services in this sector, but our growth focus therefore our investments dedicated to expanding our business across three segments: chemicals, gas, and increasingly new energies. 


Through putting ESG at the heart of what we do, we achieve better business for our partners, society and ourselves. Besides ambitiously growing our business, we consider it equally important to operate our business highest care and safety standards for our people, the communities we work in and environments we live in.  We want to make an impact in two ways. Firstly, by helping our customers reduce their CO2 footprint by enabling their transition to sustainable liquids and secondly by reducing our own emissions. So, we strive for a material share of sustainable revenues and we commit to net-zero operations by 2040 latest.
postedCompany.name: ADVARIO ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.
